education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Plastics / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Plastics
raw_text:
60. Plastic Mold Specialist

Job Summary  
Specializes in design, manufacturing, and optimization of molds for plastic components.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Design and develop p lastic injection molds  
• Optimize cooling, gating, and ejection systems  
• Troubleshoot molding defects  
• Conduct mold trials and improvements  
• Improve mold performance and cycle time  
Required Skills  
• Injection molding and mold design expertise  
• Knowledge of plastics materials  
• Mold flow analysis (preferred)  
• Problem -solving skills  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Plastics  
Experience  
• 4–9 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹40,000 – ₹85,000 per month
